title: CRUK footer — crukFooter
code:
crukFooter() #>
#>
#>
#> #> #> #>
#>
#>
#> #> #>

You are welcome to reuse this Cancer Research UK-produced content for #> your own work. Please remember to acknowledge the original data sources #> for each chart and ensure you retain the CRUK logo in the image. Please #> note that due to differences in data collection, comparison of #> performance should not be made between nations.

#>
#> #> #>

If you have any questions regarding the data or the interpretation of #> this data, or if you are having any issues with the website please #> contact:
#> cancerintelligence@cancer.org.uk (please allow #> up to 10 working days for a response)

#>

See our complete statistics pages on #> cancerresearch.org

#>
#>
#>
#>

#> Together we are #>
#> beating cancer #>

#>
#>
#>
    #>
  • #> Terms and conditions #>
    • #>

Registered company in England and Wales (4325234) and the Isle of Man (5713F). Registered address: 2 Redman Place, London, E20 1JQ.
#>
